scripts.dev:all: concurrently --restart-tries 5 --restart-after 5000 -n nuxt,vue,proxy -c cyan,yellow,red "pnpm --filter @mf/nuxt-app dev" "pnpm --filter @mf/vue-app dev" "wait-on tcp:3001 tcp:3002 && pnpm dev:proxy"
scripts.dev:proxy: pnpm --filter @mf/nuxt-app exec microfrontends proxy --local-apps monorepo-demo4-nuxt-app monorepo-demo4-vue-app --port 3000
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules .next .nuxt out
